title: Spaceport Row
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Spaceport Row''' was a street in [[Plawal Rift]], [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]]. It was lined with assorted bars and [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafes]], included among them were the [[Smoking Jets]] and [[Madame Lota's House of Flowers]]. It was presumably named due to its proximity to the local [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] and thus being often frequented by [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
*[[Children of the Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''Children of the Jedi'' abridged audiobook]]
